reviews.review_title: I need a way to be able to work offline.
reviews.review_description: This is just a connection to the web version of Word. If I wanted to work on something yesterday when I had 4 hours of downtime, I would not have been able to.

reviews.review_title: Just a link to the web version
reviews.review_description: I wanted to actual app not a link

Just a fancy shortcut to the Office365 web version.
If it had advantages over the use of the browser it could be somewhat forgiven. But no.. it only has disadvantages. Garbage!

It loads, you waste a lot of time logging in but then there is a list of your documents.

You choose to create a new document and the app opens the browser with a new tab. You may as well use the browser.

You try to copy and paste, but can't without an extension. The extension is for chrome.

It's pretty close to useless

This app somewhat gets the job done but doesn’t offer anything more than using the web version of Office… because it’s just the web version of office in a light wrapper. As a result the app doesn’t work at all without an internet connection, performance is a bit sluggish on Quest 2, and it doesn’t feel like a native app.

I'm still trying to learn how to upload my Word files from my PC to the Quest 3 Word app. I was able to transfer my Word doc files from my laptop to my Quest 3 headset with a  Syntech link cable. And all of my pics and videos uploaded nicely. But my Word files are not accessible...weird. Will keep trying.
Und Wie aktiviere ich einen Wlandrucker für die Metaquest 3?
Just a shortcut to the web version of Microsoft Word. Would be nice to have a full version.
